tickets.subject: Login issue via XML import
tickets.description: I cannot login to my account after the latest update. The password reset also does not work for me.

tickets.subject: Billing invoice discrepancy
tickets.description: The invoice I received shows a different amount than what was charged to my credit card. Please investigate the payment charge.

tickets.subject: Critical bug in production causing errors
tickets.description: Steps to reproduce: 1) Login 2) Go to dashboard 3) Click export. Expected behavior: file downloads. Actual behavior: 500 error appears.

tickets.subject: Suggestion for improved search feature
tickets.description: It would be a great enhancement to improve the search functionality with filters. Would like to see faceted search added.

tickets.subject: Timeout error on large report generation
tickets.description: When generating a report with more than 10000 records the system times out after 30 seconds and returns no data.
